summary: LUMEN 2.0 Phase A3 — Ownership Lifecycle testing completed. Backend APIs fully functional (28/28 tests passed). Frontend UI verified with screenshots showing investor journey with 8-step timeline and admin registry with ownership explorer.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: Admin and investor authentication working
✅ Backend: GET /api/investor/lifecycle returns 3 investments with canonical_state='active', certificate_number, units, 8-step array

✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/ownership/trace returns full trace with ownership (certificate_number=LMN-2026-000003), lifecycle, investments, payments, ledger, certificates, payouts, secondary_trades, ownership_events
✅ Backend: Block1 Certificate Binding - ownership has certificate_id and certificate_number bound
✅ Backend: A1 Unit Registry invariants all_ok=true (conservation, issued_matches_holders, issued_within_total, no_negative_units)
✅ Backend: A2 Certificate Engine invariants all_ok=true (active_units_match_registry, single_active_per_owner, every_active_ownership_has_cert, verify_codes_unique)
✅ Frontend: /investor/journey page loads and displays investment cards
✅ Frontend: Investment cards are expandable showing 8-step vertical timeline (Заявка, KYC, Договір, Оплата, Сертифікат, Активна інвестиція, Перша виплата, Виведення доходу)
✅ Frontend: Timeline shows done steps (green checkmarks), current step highlighted, pending steps dimmed
✅ Frontend: Canonical state badge visible ('Активна інвестиція')
✅ Frontend: Progress indicator shows 7/8 steps completed
✅ Frontend: /admin/registry page loads with dashboard showing totals (600,000 total units, 17,612 issued, 3,304 on secondary market, 582,388 available)
✅ Frontend: Asset cards display with subscription percentages and unit counts
✅ Frontend: Navigation 'Шлях інвестицій' (Investor Journey) and 'Реєстр одиниць' (Unit Registry) working
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL TEST NEEDED: Perform a secondary trade (buy-now) as investor client@atlas.dev and verify: (a) A1 registry invariants stay all_ok=true, (b) A2 certificate invariants stay all_ok=true, (c) ownership rows remain bound to active certificates, (d) certificate events include ownership_split/ownership_merge/transferred. This is the most critical test for A3 as it validates that A1+A2 invariants remain green after A3 operations. Also, the admin ownership explorer 'Trace' button functionality needs UI testing - clicking on an asset card in /admin/registry should open asset details, then clicking 'Trace' button on a holder row should open the ownership explorer drawer with all trace sections visible.

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (UI loads correctly, expandable timeline works, but Trace button interaction not fully tested)
